'''ngatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backsyfore|backsyfore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backsyfore|backsyfore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngatate|ngatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngatatesher|ngatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatatesherĂ«m|ngatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngatatero|ngatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngatateshĂ«|ngatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatateshĂ«m|ngatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingatatero|gokingatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingatateshĂ«|gokingatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatateshĂ«m|gokingatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongatankerom|gongatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongatankeshĂ«|gongatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatankeshĂ«m|gongatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongatankeya|gongatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngataterom|ngataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatatemu|ngatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngatateya|ngatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingataterom|gokingataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatatemu|gokingatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingatateya|gokingatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngatatate|ngatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngatatatesher|ngatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatatatesherĂ«m|ngatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngatatatero|ngatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngatatateshĂ«|ngatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatatateshĂ«m|ngatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingatatatero|gokingatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingatatateshĂ«|gokingatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatatateshĂ«m|gokingatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongatatankerom|gongatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongatatankeshĂ«|gongatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatatankeshĂ«m|gongatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongatatankeya|gongatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngatataterom|ngatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngatatatemu|ngatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngatatateya|ngatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingatataterom|gokingatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingatatatemu|gokingatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingatatateya|gokingatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠte|ngĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠtesher|ngĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠtero|ngĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠtĂŠtero|gokingĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠterom|ngĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠtemu|ngĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠtĂŠteya|ngĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠtĂŠteya|gokingĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngaftafte|ngaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngaftaftesher|ngaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaftaftesherĂ«m|ngaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngaftaftero|ngaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngaftafteshĂ«|ngaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaftafteshĂ«m|ngaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingaftafteshĂ«|gokingaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaftafteshĂ«m|gokingaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongaftafnkerom|gongaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongaftafnkeshĂ«|gongaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongaftafnkeshĂ«m|gongaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongaftafnkeya|gongaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngaftafterom|ngaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaftaftemu|ngaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngaftafteya|ngaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingaftafterom|gokingaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaftaftemu|gokingaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingaftafteya|gokingaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
